# UnitPrecise

> Fast, precise unit conversion for length, weight, temperature, volume, and dozens more categories.

UnitPrecise is a professional unit conversion tool with engineering-grade precision across SI, US Customary, and Imperial systems.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Search and quick converters for the most common categories.
- [All converters](/converters): Browse every unit category.
- [Length](/c/length): Convert meters, feet, inches, miles and more.
- [Weight](/c/weight): Convert kilograms, pounds, ounces, tonnes and more.
- [Temperature](/c/temperature): Convert Celsius, Fahrenheit, Kelvin and Rankine.
- [Volume](/c/volume): Convert liters, gallons, cups and more.
